title: October 2018 Back Page – Lending A Helping Hand:
summary: A few weeks ago an AVEC lineman (John) in Gambell got a call about a member, an Elder named Beulah, who had lost power to her home. He went to check on the problem and discovered that Beulah lived in a small house that was surrounded by a dozen or more 24” deep open pits. Apparently some local resid...

title: USDA-NASS announces the 2017 Census of Agriculture response rate, data release details, and upcoming special studies
summary: United States Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) concluded data collection for the 2017 Census of Agriculture with a 71.5 percent national response rate.

title: Our Feature by “Inside Philanthropy”
summary: Inside Philanthropy, a prestigious online news source that covers philanthropy funders around the country, recently wrote a wonderful piece on Alaska Conservation Foundation!
